message:
feat(server): consume mailbox verdict for primary read surface + ack_filter query param

Wire the new mailbox health verdict into the HTTP/WS server so every
incoming read request gets dispatched to the archive snapshot when
the live db is suspect, and teach `mail_ui` to accept a tri-valued
ack filter from the URL.

## crates/mcp-agent-mail-server/src/lib.rs

- Private re-export of
  `archive_storage_root_is_authoritative_for_sqlite_path` so the
  server can consult the same authoritative-storage-root decision
  the tools crate uses, without duplicating the logic.
- The server state bootstrap now computes a
  `MailboxHealthVerdict` once at startup and on every
  storage-root reload, and stashes it alongside the primary db
  handle. Each read handler queries the verdict before choosing
  between the live db and the archive snapshot reader, matching
  the pattern the tools crate adopted. Writes always go to the
  live db.
- `parse_ack_filter_param(value)` decodes the `ack_filter` query
  parameter into `Option<bool>` with three legal values:
  `"pending"` / `"true"` → `Some(true)`,
  `"acknowledged"` / `"false"` → `Some(false)`,
  `"all"` / `"any"` → `Some(None)` (i.e. skip filtering).
  Returns `None` for unrecognized values so the handler can reject
  with a 400 instead of silently defaulting. Used by the inbox and
  thread listing routes to let clients filter by ack state without
  having to compose a separate endpoint per case.
- Per-route verdict reads are tagged in the structured log so the
  operator can see which requests were served from the archive vs.
  the live db in a single grep. Useful when diagnosing a run where
  the live db is partially corrupt.

## crates/mcp-agent-mail-server/src/mail_ui.rs

- mail_ui rendering code now honors the verdict when loading rows
  for the attachment / message / file-reservation panes. When the
  verdict prefers archive snapshot reads, the panes render from
  the archive snapshot instead of returning the current
  "[redacted: live db suspect]" placeholder.
- Minor rustfmt reflow of the test fixture that seeds the mail_ui
  snapshot test.
